curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/PIL/FpxImagePlugin.py (1 non-test source file). The vulnerability is in _open_index where i32(s, 4) is passed directly to range() without validation. The fix extracts the value into a 'bands' variable and raises IOError if bands > 4. Checked PcfFontFile.py which has a similar range(i32(...)) pattern but serves a different architectural role (font file parsing, not image plugin), so it was not added as a sibling location. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (CWE-190) confirmed: the unvalidated 32-bit integer from crafted input causes overflow on 32-bit systems and resource exhaustion on 64-bit systems.
